clues.clue: Snow White keeps house for this many diamond-mining dwarfs.
In 'Tangled,' Rapunzel's loyal companion is this color-changing reptile, Pascal.
In 'The Princess and the Frog,' a trumpet-loving bayou reptile named Louis is this toothy species.
In 'Moana,' the heroine is stuck at sea with this dim-witted clucking barnyard bird.
Sleeping Beauty is raised in the woods by three good ones of these magical winged women.
Orphaned billionaire Bruce Wayne prowls Gotham at night as this caped figure.
A scrawny recruit named Steve Rogers takes a super-soldier serum to become this star-spangled hero.
Wisecracking mercenary Wade Wilson breaks the fourth wall as this red-suited antihero.
Diana Prince walks among humans while secretly being this Amazon warrior.
Weather-controlling mutant Ororo Munroe leads the X-Men under this codename.
This 2003 Pixar film follows a clownfish dad searching the ocean for his son.
In "Ice Age" (2002), this acorn-obsessed saber-toothed squirrel steals every scene.
Will Smith voiced Oscar, a fast-talking fish, in this 2004 DreamWorks film.
This 2005 DreamWorks film sends four Central Park Zoo animals to an African island.
In Disney's 2002 "Lilo & Stitch," Stitch is officially designated this experiment number.
Iron Man, Cap and Thor headline this team billed as 'Earth's Mightiest Heroes.'
Superman, Batman and Wonder Woman anchor this premier DC super-team.
Professor Charles Xavier mentors this family of mutant heroes.
Star-Lord, Groot and Rocket form this cosmic, wisecracking Marvel squad.
clues.response: Who are the Guardians of the Galaxy?

clues.clue: Robin, Starfire and Cyborg form this youthful 'Teen' DC team.
'I'll Be There for You' by The Rembrandts opens this NBC comedy about six pals in New York.
'Movin' on Up' to a deluxe apartment is the theme of this 'All in the Family' spin-off.
'Making your way in the world today takes everything you've got' opens this Boston bar comedy.
'Thank you for being a friend' introduces this sitcom about four older women in Miami.
A rapped origin story 'born and raised' in West Philadelphia opens this Will Smith comedy.
clues.response: What is The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air?

final.clue: This mustachioed writer-editor co-created Spider-Man and the X-Men and made cameos in many Marvel films.
